title: IC 36-1-1-2 - Preservation of materials related to title
text:
IC 36-1-1-2
Preservation of materials related to title
Sec. 2. The general assembly may, by concurrent resolution, preserve any of the materials
related to the enactment of this title that it considers appropriate.
[Local Government Recodification Citation: New.]
As added by Acts 1980, P.L.211, SEC.1.
Indiana Code 2024

IC 36-1-1.5
Chapter 1.5. Expired
